label: High Fantasy
tone: heroic, luminous, mythic

visual.palette_notes: bright steel, gold leaf, sapphire, emerald, warm oak
visual.lighting_notes: warm torchlight, radiant magical aura, clean midday sun on stone

label: Dark Fantasy
tone: grim, weathered, morally ambiguous

visual.palette_notes: deep shadow, tarnished iron, soot-black, dried blood, muted jewel tones
visual.lighting_notes: low guttering torchlight, overcast diffuse, no clean highlights

prompt_fragments: tarnished iron and dried blood palette

label: Low Fantasy
tone: grounded, mundane-world-with-rare-magic, unglamorous

visual.palette_notes: mud brown, undyed linen, raw iron, muted greens, peasant grey
visual.lighting_notes: overcast daylight, smoky hearth, no magical glow

label: Fairytale
tone: whimsical, storybook-enchanted, surface-sweet with dark undertow

visual.palette_notes: rose blush, powder blue, gilded cream, forest moss, midnight black as contrast
visual.lighting_notes: soft diffuse storybook light, moonlit clearing acceptable

label: Wuxia
tone: martial nobility, flowing and swift, honour-bound

visual.palette_notes: ink-black, lacquer red, jade green, brushed gold, white silk
visual.lighting_notes: clear open-sky light, mist over mountain acceptable

prompt_fragments: flowing silk robes and dao blades

label: Cosmic Horror
tone: vast, unknowable, wrong

visual.palette_notes: deep violet, bioluminescent green, necrotic yellow, abyssal black
visual.lighting_notes: faint cold bioluminescence, sourceless wrong-spectrum glow

label: Gothic Horror
tone: decayed, aristocratic, tragic

visual.palette_notes: ash grey, deep crimson, tarnished silver, candlelight amber
visual.lighting_notes: candlelight, moon through stained glass, deep shadow with warm amber pools

label: Movie Horror
tone: slasher-real, suburban-uncanny, visceral shock

visual.palette_notes: everyday beige and grey, sudden violence red, fluorescent wash, night-black
visual.lighting_notes: harsh fluorescent interior, suburban exterior daylight, pitch dark with single beam

prompt_fragments: everyday palette broken by violence red

label: Body Horror
tone: flesh transgressed, biological wrongness, organic corruption

visual.palette_notes: raw flesh pink, arterial red, bile yellow, necrotic grey, exposed-bone white
visual.lighting_notes: clinical flat or autopsy-cold; no flattering light

prompt_fragments: fused bone and exposed tissue materials

label: Folk Horror
tone: rural, pagan, isolation-dread, old-rites

visual.palette_notes: harvest gold, dried-blood brown, undyed wool, moss green, chalk white
visual.lighting_notes: flat overcast field light, bonfire flicker, torch procession

label: Pulp Sci-Fi
tone: 1950s rocket-age optimism, lurid and bold, chrome and ray-guns

visual.palette_notes: chrome silver, candy red, bright yellow, space blue, signal orange
visual.lighting_notes: bold graphic lit, colour-saturated, retro ray-gun glow acceptable

label: Cyberpunk
tone: neon-soaked, corporate dystopia, street-level grit

visual.palette_notes: neon magenta, electric cyan, rain-slick black, dirty concrete, acid yellow accent
visual.lighting_notes: neon sign bleed, holographic UI glow, rain diffusion — render flat per rules

label: Space Opera
tone: galactic epic scale, diverse alien cultures, baroque starship design

visual.palette_notes: nebula violet, starfield black, gold hull trim, alien-fauna colours, imperial white
visual.lighting_notes: star-backlit, engine glow acceptable, alien sun spectrum

label: Hard SF
tone: industrial, utilitarian, lived-in realism

visual.palette_notes: gunmetal, scuffed matte black, warning orange, hydraulic yellow
visual.lighting_notes: functional work-light, harsh task illumination, no atmospheric glow

label: Post-Human
tone: transcended biology, fluid identity, synthetic sublime

visual.palette_notes: translucent white, bioluminescent blue, vantablack, data-stream silver, synthetic flesh
visual.lighting_notes: internal luminescence from beneath skin or chassis — render flat per rules

label: Military
tone: contemporary tactical, utilitarian lethality, unit cohesion

visual.palette_notes: multicam green-brown, coyote tan, ranger green, flat dark earth, black hardware
visual.lighting_notes: harsh field daylight, flat tactical — no cinematic lighting

label: Superhero
tone: larger-than-life, iconic silhouette, power made visible

visual.palette_notes: primary hero colours, bold contrast, metallic sheen, vibrant signal tones
visual.lighting_notes: bold graphic, rim light acceptable to define silhouette — render flat per rules

label: WWII
tone: wartime grim pragmatism, olive drab and field grey, total-war scale

visual.palette_notes: olive drab, field grey, khaki, leather brown, blued steel, mud
visual.lighting_notes: overcast European daylight, Pacific sun, smoky battlefield haze

label: WWI
tone: mud-and-wire attrition, early industrial warfare, tragic futility

visual.palette_notes: trench mud brown, khaki drab, steel grey, gas-mask green, rusted wire
visual.lighting_notes: flat overcast, mud-diffused, no-man's-land grey

label: Noir
tone: rain-slicked cynicism, crime-world shadow, moral ambiguity in fedora and trench coat

visual.palette_notes: near-monochrome: charcoal, cream, deep shadow, single amber lamp, cigarette haze
visual.lighting_notes: single hard lamp source casting long shadows — represent as palette contrast, render flat

label: Espionage
tone: cold-war sleek, tradecraft concealment, elegant lethality

visual.palette_notes: charcoal grey, navy, stone, brushed stainless, discrete accent red or gold
visual.lighting_notes: controlled interior light, embassy marble, airport glass — clean and cold

label: Steampunk
tone: Victorian-industrial, brass-and-steam ingenuity, clockwork grandeur

visual.palette_notes: aged brass, copper verdigris, mahogany brown, ivory, soot-stained cream
visual.lighting_notes: gas-lamp amber, coal-furnace orange glow acceptable

label: Dieselpunk
tone: interwar industrial, art-deco geometry, oil-and-iron machismo

visual.palette_notes: battleship grey, oil-stained black, art-deco gold stripe, blood red accent, industrial tan
visual.lighting_notes: arc-welder spark, factory halogen, hard angular shadows

label: Atompunk
tone: 1950s atomic optimism laced with fallout dread, space-age domestic

visual.palette_notes: aqua teal, lemon yellow, coral red, aluminium silver, fallout green
visual.lighting_notes: sunny suburban daylight, atomic-core glow acceptable

prompt_fragments: space-age domestic design with fallout dread

label: Gamma World
tone: post-apocalyptic mutant pulp, salvage-tech exuberance, irradiated absurdity

visual.palette_notes: radiation green, rust orange, bleached bone, cobbled primary colours, toxic purple
visual.lighting_notes: harsh wasteland sun, radioactive glow acceptable as material property

label: Sword & Planet
tone: planetary romance, exotic alien barbarism, steel-and-starship heroics

visual.palette_notes: alien sky magenta, twin-moon silver, copper sand, exotic fauna colours, ochre rock
visual.lighting_notes: alien sun harsh, coloured-sky ambience acceptable

label: Ancient
tone: bronze-age to classical antiquity, monumental and sun-baked

visual.palette_notes: sun-bleached limestone white, terracotta, bronze, azurite blue, ochre yellow
visual.lighting_notes: harsh Mediterranean or Mesopotamian sun, flat and brilliant

label: Viking / Norse
tone: brutal, earthy, tribal warrior-caste

visual.palette_notes: bronze, woad blue, undyed linen, rust iron, deep forest green
visual.lighting_notes: grey Northern overcast, firelight in longhouse

label: Medieval
tone: feudal Europe, chainmail pragmatism, ecclesiastical weight

visual.palette_notes: chainmail silver, heraldic red and blue, wool black, parchment cream, tarnished gold
visual.lighting_notes: overcast Northern Europe daylight, candle in chapel

label: Samurai
tone: feudal Japanese discipline, lacquer and steel, austere elegance

visual.palette_notes: lacquer red, ink black, gold mon, undyed white silk, burnished steel
visual.lighting_notes: clear East Asian daylight, paper-screen interior diffuse

label: Age of Sail
tone: maritime empire, salt and tar, broadside cannon grandeur

visual.palette_notes: ocean blue-grey, tarred oak brown, cannon-black, brass fittings, faded colonial red
visual.lighting_notes: open ocean daylight, lantern below-decks

label: Classic Western
tone: frontier honour code, sun-bleached open range, Hollywood golden age

visual.palette_notes: sun-bleached cream, saddle tan, sky blue, blued-steel grey, dark chocolate leather
visual.lighting_notes: harsh noon sun, golden-hour amber, clear blue-sky daylight

label: Spaghetti Western
tone: nihilistic, grimy, close-up tension, Leone morally-empty landscape

visual.palette_notes: bleached bone, sweat-stained cream, burnt sienna, gun-metal grey, dried-blood rust
visual.lighting_notes: extreme noon contrast, sweat-sheen — represent as palette, render flat

label: Weird West
tone: frontier horror-occult, supernatural corruption in dust-town USA

visual.palette_notes: dust tan, corruption purple, bone white, dried-blood brown, unnatural green
visual.lighting_notes: dead-noon sun with wrong shadows, sickly moon — palette-driven, render flat

label: Apocalypse West
tone: post-collapse frontier, salvage-cowboy, wasteland-range lawlessness

visual.palette_notes: ash grey, rust red, bleached bone, dirty olive, faded denim
visual.lighting_notes: post-collapse overcast or brutal unfiltered sun, no warmth
